'''Sirenas Firil''' was a novice [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She worked with a small guild out of [[Port Evokk]], but also freelanced. Firil was part of a job to hunt down [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] agent [[Pallas Quintell]].

==Biography==
Firil had been a professional bounty hunter for only a year before getting an assignment from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to track a rebel agent. She worked with another novice bounty hunter named [[Chandrex Grenn]]. They tracked the Rebel to a [[Pallas's base camp|secret camp]] in the foothills on [[Kallistas]]. After a brief firefight they were able to disarm the rebel, wounding him in the process. They turned their captive over to [[Imperial Prefect|Prefect]] [[Dengless Rinn]] and divided their thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] prize between them. Rinn then hired Firil and Grenn, along with another bounty hunter, [[Demos Traxen]], to hunt the pirate [[Jondrell Inx]].

==Behind the scenes==
Sirenas Firil was designed by [[Bill Smith]] for ''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]'', a supplement for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' that was published by [[West End Games]] in [[1994]].
